questions.question: What distinguished actor was the first African-American to win an Academy Award for Best Actor for his work in Lilies of the Field?

Name the 1964 musical starring Julie Andrews that won five Academy Awards and was practically perfect in every way.
Who did Jacqueline Kennedy marry in 1968?
What were tough guys known as in the 1950s?
